difficulty_note: Mainline-hard Misty fight after the Nugget Bridge crisis. Starmie creates the first real speed and type-pressure check without becoming a Radical Red wall.

player_side.story_support: Red watches from the stands and helps Antman review strategy before the match; gym battles remain one-on-one.

opponent.intent: post-crisis gym test after Misty sees Antman and Red stop Rocket and Gold Dust on Nugget Bridge
